category_sources: Official Zoy Gitea README describes ASCII art generation.
source_facts.description says it is a color-based alternative to figlet using libcaca.
display_name_sources: Official project/homepage and package naming use toilet; upstream stylization is commonly TOIlet.
docs_sources: Official source repository README is the available project documentation surface.
source_facts.homepage points to the official caca.zoy.org wiki page for toilet.
repo_sources: Official Zoy Gitea project page for cacalabs/toilet states it is a mirror of https://github.com/cacalabs/toilet.git.
tags_sources: Official repository README describes ASCII art generation.
source_facts.description identifies figlet-like color text output and libcaca use.
